creator: maxim@macomnet.ru
text:
/bin/date -f is broken. Please take a look at
	How-To-Repeat section.

Fix: Here is my hack, but AFAIK ru@freebsd.org has a more generic solution.
How-To-Repeat: 
	# date 200105310101
	Thu May 31 01:01:00 MSD 2001
	$ date -j -f "%m" 2 "+%b"
	Mar
	$ date -j -f "%m" 3 "+%b"
	Mar
